title: More FPS
description: Play with more FPS than ever with this wonderful optimized modpack!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_FPS/BH_MFPS_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/more-fps-fabric) version.** ## Is Minecraft slow for you? In summary, this pack of mods has been designed with the aim of improving the performance of Minecraft, as well as increasing the number of FPS of the games. Among other things, players will have the ability to modify particles or animations, among many other options. In any case, by default and without touching any type of adjustment, the improvement will be immense, and for example, the generation of the terrain will consume much less resources. Also, it supports Shaders! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_FPS/BH_MFPS_summary.webp) It is an ideal modpack for all those players who simply want to play Minecraft with a higher number of FPS, in addition, it is also the perfect base to create your modpack to your liking. Without a doubt, the FPS will increase drastically, without having to touch any settings and of course, without losing quality. It's shader compatible! 🔝 Play a vanilla game, but much more optimized! You won't need OptiFine, we have added other mods that make the optimization much better, such as Sodium, Sodium Extra, Lithium or Indium, among others. 😎 Use shaders in any game! Thanks to Iris Shaders, you will be able to use your favorite shaders, although we have already included MakeUp - Ultra Fast, which are super good and optimized. ⁉️ It's an ideal modpack for your server, and of course, you can play it with your friends without any problem! We have also incorporated some ideal mods for server optimization, such as Spark. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/More_FPS/BH_MFPS_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 4GB or 4096 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
